title: pulsatilla × celakovskyana
intro: Pulsatilla × celakovskyana, also known as Pasque flower, is a hybrid plant that results from the cross between Pulsatilla vulgaris and Pulsatilla occidentalis. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Pulsatilla × celakovskyana include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve respiratory issues, and soothe skin conditions such as eczema. Pulsatilla × celakovskyana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried flower for use in herbal remedies, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
